positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~popular(black_mirror)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    popular(stranger_things)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~binge(X0) | download(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) | binge(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~download(black_mirror)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all groundings,
    whenever download(X0) is true, set binge(X0) to true
for all inputs,
    define share(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

5. netflix_show(black_mirror) [input(axiom)]
7. ~popular(black_mirror) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~popular(black_mirror) [negated conjecture 7]
9. popular(black_mirror) [flattening 8]
11. ! [X0] : (binge(X0) => download(X0)) [unused predicate definition removal 3]
12. ! [X0] : (binge(X0) | (~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0))) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0] : (binge(X0) | ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : (download(X0) | ~binge(X0)) [ennf transformation 11]
16. ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) | binge(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
17. ~binge(X0) | download(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
18. ~download(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 4]
19. netflix_show(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 5]
20. popular(black_mirror) [cnf transformation 9]
21. ~popular(black_mirror) | binge(black_mirror) [resolution 16,19]
22. binge(black_mirror) [forward subsumption resolution 21,20]
23. download(black_mirror) [resolution 22,17]
24. $false [forward subsumption resolution 23,18]
